column1: If Impact = Catastrophic (5) → risk is at least High (or requires senior review), even if likelihood is low.
This especially applies to life-safety events, major regulatory/accreditation exposure, major financial or operational continuity risks, and serious misconduct/Title IX-type risks.
Keep the numeric score (for consistency) but require senior review and a treatment plan because the consequence is catastrophic.
